gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, while event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, clutching resumes inside branded folders, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; additionally, tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, while dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and a welcome announcement outlining the fair schedule plays over the PA system; students clutch resumes inside branded folders, while career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, near dozens of booths with colorful banners circling the polished floor, where healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, while healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; additionally, students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, clutching resumes inside branded folders, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, while healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; additionally, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: A welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, while event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance; additionally, dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, where healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; also, students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, clutching resumes inside branded folders, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, while tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor; additionally, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, with healthcare providers showcasing community outreach photos, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens.

Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor; additionally, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, with healthcare providers showcasing community outreach photos, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders, while career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; additionally, healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, as tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens; a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, clutching resumes inside branded folders, while healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; additionally, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance; furthermore, career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
